codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 287d9db8d9831d927072920eeee2306491e341e3 adding tests/integration/state-machine.test.ts (16 integration scenarios). The test coverage aligns with feature expectations for state-machine transitions, reset behavior, session isolation, mode-switch flows, multi-page behavior, and error recovery. No high-confidence correctness bugs were found in this feature diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-worker skill procedure currently instructs workers to create tests in tests/unit/, but this feature correctly required and produced integration tests under tests/integration/. Skill guidance appears too narrow for cross-screen integration features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-worker/SKILL.md:22 says "Create test file(s) in `tests/unit/`"; reviewed commit adds tests/integration/state-machine.test.ts for feature end-to-end-integration.

summary: Feature review passed. Implementation is test-focused and correctly adds comprehensive state-machine integration coverage with no blocking issues identified; one skill-documentation gap was noted.
